scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='../../lib/api-zod/src/index.ts';let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');c=c.split('\n').filter(l=>!l.includes('generated/types')&&!l.includes('generated/api.schemas')).join('\n');fs.writeFileSync(f,c);" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
